# その他の種類の忍耐

• 推奨される忍耐（ムスタハッブ）
• 許可される忍耐（ハラール）
• 忌避される忍耐（マクルーフ）
• 禁止される忍耐（ハラーム）

- Encouraged 
  - Abstaining from disliked things
  - Performing liked and encouraged acts 
  - Refraining from taking revenge 
- Forbidden 
  - Not eating / drinking until death
  - Abstaining from eating haram food during starvation 
  - Refraining from begging
  - Enduring things that may lead to death 
  - Patience during a trial when believers are fighting one another  
- Disliked 
  - Abstaining from food / drinking to the extent of damage to one’s health 
- Permissible 
  - Abstaining from permissible deeds
